Shuswap Region, BC · Wagon Windows

Our Window Cleaning Service Area — Shuswap Region, BC

We operate out of Salmon Arm and cover the full Shuswap — from Swansea Point in the north to Spallumcheen in the south. If you're within about 60 minutes of Salmon Arm, we can come to you. Most communities in our area are served at our standard rates with no travel surcharge.

Book Free Quote (403) 837-5092

Communities We Serve

We cover 14 communities across the North and South Shuswap, Salmon River Valley, and surrounding areas. Click any community to see services and pricing specific to that location.

Salmon Arm Window Cleaning Our home base Sorrento Window Cleaning ~35 min from Salmon Arm Tappen Window Cleaning ~25 min from Salmon Arm Blind Bay Window Cleaning ~30 min from Salmon Arm Sicamous Window Cleaning ~45 min from Salmon Arm Chase Window Cleaning ~55 min from Salmon Arm Enderby Window Cleaning ~35 min from Salmon Arm Armstrong Window Cleaning ~45 min from Salmon Arm Eagle Bay Window Cleaning ~25 min from Salmon Arm Celista Window Cleaning ~50 min from Salmon Arm Scotch Creek Window Cleaning ~55 min from Salmon Arm Grindrod Window Cleaning ~40 min from Salmon Arm Spallumcheen Window Cleaning ~45 min from Salmon Arm Swansea Point Window Cleaning ~45 min from Salmon Arm

How Far We Travel

Our base is Salmon Arm. On a typical work day we'll cover a route that might include Blind Bay, Sorrento, and Eagle Bay — or head north through Scotch Creek to Celista. The furthest corners of our area are about 55–60 minutes away. For properties within that radius, standard rates apply. Properties beyond 60 minutes may carry a travel fee — we'll tell you upfront if that applies to your address.

Rural and Lakefront Properties

Many of our customers are on Shuswap Lake, Mara Lake, or tucked into rural properties off secondary roads. We've cleaned lakefront vacation homes, agricultural properties in the Spallumcheen Valley, and hillside chalets above Blind Bay. Gravel roads, long driveways, and steep lots don't intimidate us — we carry the right equipment. The main thing that affects scheduling is road conditions in early spring and late fall, when some back roads are soft.

Seasonal Service Windows

The Shuswap has a real four-season climate. Our busiest windows are May–June (post-pollen) and September–October (pre-winter prep). In peak season we book 2–3 weeks out, so scheduling early — especially for spring gutters or fall window packages — is recommended. We work year-round, including winter when conditions allow. Hard water stain removal and interior-only cleaning are good shoulder-season options when outdoor work isn't ideal.

Commercial Clients Across the Region

We serve commercial properties in Salmon Arm, Sicamous, Enderby, and Armstrong. Storefronts, hotels, restaurants, strata buildings, and professional offices are all in our scope. Commercial clients in smaller communities like Blind Bay and Chase are served as part of our residential route days — meaning we're already in the area and can fit commercial stops efficiently.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you serve properties on Shuswap Lake?

Yes — lakefront properties across the North and South arms of Shuswap Lake are a core part of our service area. This includes communities like Blind Bay, Sorrento, Eagle Bay, Celista, Scotch Creek, and Swansea Point. Many of our lakefront clients book twice yearly — spring before the season starts and fall before closing up.

Is there a travel fee for communities outside Salmon Arm?

No travel fee for any community within our listed service area. The 14 communities on this page are all served at standard rates. A surcharge may apply for one-off jobs well beyond our regular route — we'll confirm before booking.

Do you take on jobs in communities not listed here?

Sometimes. If you're in the broader North Okanagan or Columbia Shuswap area, reach out and we'll let you know if we can fit you into a route. We occasionally extend beyond our core area for larger jobs or repeat commercial clients.
